narration_text: If you’re feeling anxious, watch this before you spiral. In peace I will lie down and sleep, for You alone, Lord, make me dwell in safety. Psalm four, verse eight. Cast all your anxiety on Him, because He cares for you. First Peter five, seven. Picture handing Him one worry at a time. Do not worry about tomorrow; today has enough trouble. Matthew six, thirty-four. Remember, the night magnifies what the morning will shrink. God is already in tomorrow. Lord, carry what I can’t, calm what I can’t control, and give me rest while You work. Amen.
